nodes.html:
Working on the migration of Cnam Sophia application (Caisse nationale de l’Assurance Maladie). The application is based on Pega Customer Service 8.3 and manages the health insurance support service for chronically ill patients. It is offered throughout France to people with diabetes treated in the context of a long-term illness and since 2018 to people with asthma.

E-learning Pega Customer Services Developer 8.3

Key activities

  • Estimate implementation level of effort based upon requirements and design
  • Design and development of functionalities based on Pega PRPC Customer Services 8.3
  • Cross-code reviews
  • Implement unit tests
  • Pega delivery
  • Agile Software Development with Agile Studio
  • Distributed Development team (France India)

Team organization

  • 25+ developers.

Technical environment

Pega 8.3, Pega Customer Service 8.3, HP QC, SQL, CTI.

• Tokyo: 3 months at Akamonkai Japanese Language School and graduate JLPT N3
  • Urasoe Ryukyu daigaku, Okinawa: attend the Global Game Jam 2019
  • Ushimado, Okayama: Workaway Farmer volunteer
  • Kyoto: Self code training on Java Spring boot, ReactJs and Firebase techno with small projects (E-Commerce, Twitter, Messenger, Covid-tracker et Discord)

Design and develop a new solution for Air France on the ICare application. The application is based on Pega Customer Service 7.2 and manages AFKLM customer claims.

Key activities

  • Develop new features in large organization using SAFE framework
  • Estimate implementation level of effort based upon requirements and design
  • Design and development of functionalities based on Pega PRPC Customer Services 7.2
  • Cross-code reviews
  • Implement unit tests
  • Write and execute functional tests
  • Packaging, delivery, integration (Jenkins)
  • Agile Software Development with JIRA
  • Distributed Development team (France India)

Team organization

  • 1 scrum master, 4 French developers in Air France office, 4 Indian developers.

Technical environment

Pega 7.2, Pega Customer Service 7.2, HP QC, SQL, SOAPUI, REST, Postman, bash.

Design and develop a new solution for Groupe Solimut Mutuelles de France, to manage the relationship driven customer service.

Certified Pega Senior System Architect 7.4

Overall actions

  • Mentoring and support the trainee engineer to learn and develop efficiently with Pega PRPC Customer Services 7.3.
  • Mentoring and support the trainee engineer to the development of the automated test tool for Pega web application based PhantomJS.
  • Continue to mentor and support of trainee engineer in the previous project that is now in charge of the development and maintenance of the automated test tool and framework for Pega Web applications based on Selenium (Java)

Key activities

  • Estimate implementation level of effort based upon requirements and design
  • Advice the customer on user experience aspect
  • Design and development of functionalities based on Pega PRPC Customer Services 7.3 and Pega Cloud services
  • Cross-code reviews
  • Implement unit tests
  • Write and execute functional tests
  • Integration of external APIs with client IS applications and DMS (REST API)
  • Integration of call center API Eloquant in the Pega platform (Javascript)
  • Packaging, delivery, integration (Jenkins)
  • Agile Software Development with JIRA

Team organization

  • 1 scrum master/developer and 3 developers at Sopra Steria.

Technical environment

Pega 7.3, Pega Customer Services, Pega Cloud services, HP QC, Jenkins, SOAPUI, REST, Java, Eclipse, Selenium, PhantomJS, Javascript, CTI.

Design and develop a new solution for Orange Business Services, to manage the service activation from customer order until on-site installation around the world.

Certified Pega System Architect 7.2

Overall actions

  • Mentoring and support the newcomers to learn and develop with Pega PRPC 7.2.
  • Mentoring and support of trainee engineer in the team to the development and maintenance of the automated test tool and framework for Pega Web applications based on Selenium (Java)

Key activities

  • Estimate implementation level of effort based upon requirements and design
  • Design and development of functionalities based on Pega PRPC 7.2
  • Cross-code reviews
  • Implement unit tests
  • Write and execute functional tests
  • Integration of external APIs with client IS applications (SOAP and REST API)
  • Packaging, delivery, integration (Jenkins)
  • Agile Software Development with Project Management Framework (PMF)
  • Distributed Development team (France India)

Team organization

  • Sopra Steria side: 1 scrum master, 1 business analyst, 5 French developers, 8 Indian developers
  • Orange side: 1 project owner, 10 business analysts and stakeholders

Technical environment

Pega 7.2, HP QC, Jenkins, Java, Eclipse, Selenium, Excel POI, SQL, SOAPUI, REST, bash.

Trainee Engineer project

Development of automated test tool and framework for Pega web applications based on Selenium (Java).

Technical environment

Pega 7.2, HP QC, Jenkins, Java, Eclipse, Selenium, Excel POI, Maven, SQL, bash, SVN.

Design and development of a Web application for testing purpose based on an already existing solution. Users can create new tests such as ping, SQL request, web services call. The application will perform with recurrence the tests and notify stakeholders by message using OpenFire server, mail or phone call.

Objectif: Integrate customer part in the current solution

Features implemented

  • Bugs fixing in display
  • Create new type of test for phantomJS script testing
  • Rework of message service using OpenFire server
  • Add layer customer account/role
  • Implementation of a Thread Pool to launch multiple test in parallel
  • Add Internationalisation

Technical environment

Java 1.6, Eclipse, JavaEE, Spring, Hibernate 3, SOAPUI, Bootstrap 2.3, HTML, CSS, Javascript, JQuery Linux, Server OpenFire, MySQL 5.5

Design and implement a Java ERP for the prevention of natural risks in direct relationship with the customer. The goal of this tool is to connect places, actors and actions to achieve against a natural risk to trigger proper emergency protocol.

Key activities

  • Estimate implementation level and drafting of the specification
  • Self teaching java
  • Weekly test with the customer

Technical environment

Java 1.6, design pattern MVC and Java Swing.
